title: Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution no. 2019-11, dated July 9, 2019, entitled ? Resolution approving the 20% Municipal Development Fund of the Municipality of Los Baños amounting to Fifty Million Seven Hundred Eighty-Seven Thousand Nine Hundred Sixty-Two Pesos (Php 50,787,962.00) for CY 2020.
